nasb.text: They stood at their stations after their custom, according to the law of Moses the man of God; the priests sprinkled the blood which they received from the hand of the Levites.

esv.text: They took their accustomed posts according to the Law of Moses the man of God. The priests threw the blood that they received from the hand of the Levites.

cnv.text: 他們遵照神人摩西的律法，按著定例，站在自己的崗位上。祭司從利未人手裡把血接過來，灑在祭壇上。

ccb.text: 然后照上帝的仆人摩西的律法照常供职。祭司从利未人手中接过血，洒在坛上。
